text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some time has passed since I began working with
<chrname>. One day, we arrive at the
racetrack and see...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... I did it! I'm first!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Take it easy, Teio. Paced running isn't about who
finishes first.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Wheeze! Cough! Finally... finished...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Wh-whoa! You okay, Tsuru? Ooh, what do I keep
telling you about pushing your limits like that?!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Slow and steady wins the race—there's no need to
rush. We still have time, so catch your breath,
and then we can move on from there.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: O-okay! Breathe in... Breathe out... In... And out...

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, sorry about that! I got carried away at the
thought of being able to train with everybody!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hm... But I suspect that's what's behind your
success. I feel like every time I see you two these
days, you're growing by leaps and bounds.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Relying only on oneself for motivation has its
limits. There are heights that can only be reached
by combining our strength and using each other
as springboards to leap ever higher.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I hope to see the both of you continue working
toward mutual improvement, to reach those lofty
peaks.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: The both of us? Like, just us?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: We both want to improve along with you, Prez! That's what we thought we were doing this entire time!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Oh, my apologies! I have a terrible habit of
speaking as though I'm not part of the equation.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It goes without saying that I've also gained much
from running together with you.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Teio, you take your straightforward fighting spirit
into every race.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And Tsuyoshi, you possess an earnest, tireless
drive to improve yourself. You've both pushed me
to become a better runner.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Your daily, prodigious efforts are an inspiration
to me.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... P-President Rudolf! I'm so touched!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! But don't think we'll go easy on you just
'cause you said some nice things!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
If we keep improving at this rate, pretty soon,
you'll be the one trying to catch up with us!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
You said it, Teio! All right! I'm all fired up and
ready to go again!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, then what are we waiting for? How about
ten incline dashes, back-to-back?!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Mrgh! I won't give up! C'mon, Tsuyoshi! You got
this!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You two truly are prodigious... Hehe. I'm glad I
have you to rely on.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With their break over, the three start running
again. I watch them go, burning the sight of their
camaraderie into my mind.
